$comment: Generic, reusable Fangorn resolver schema for an on-demand Common Crawl job. Register with: node src/publish.mjs --schema fangorn.crawljob.v1 --schema-def schemas/crawl_job.json --register-only. Records published under this schema are consumed by `quickbeam scrape`. Authored in Fangorn's @type grammar (see @fangorn-network/sdk roles/schema/types) so it is validated at publish time.

routes.@description: CmonCrawl extract routes: URL regexes → extractors. Mirrors CmonCrawl's extract config `routes` verbatim.

extractors.@description: Extractor modules referenced by routes. Each carries inline `source` and/or an IPFS `sourceCid`.

query.@description: Which slice of Common Crawl to fetch. `limit` caps the crawl and therefore the price.

outputSchema.@description: Name of the schema the produced {name, fields} records are published under.

outputSchemaDef.@description: Optional resolver SchemaDefinition to register for the output schema (freeform — itself a Fangorn schema definition). Omit to register the output schema out of band.

paymentReceipt.@description: Base64-encoded x402 payment object (a signed ERC-3009 transferWithAuthorization) authorizing the crawl fee to the operator. Verified + settled before the job runs.

name.@description: Extractor module name; matches an `extractors[].name` and the module's filename.

since.@description: ISO date — only apply this extractor to crawls on/after.

to.@description: ISO date — only apply this extractor to crawls on/before.

regexes.@description: URL regexes; a record is routed to this route's extractors if any matches.

name.@description: Module name referenced by routes; the module must expose a top-level `extractor` variable.

source.@description: Inline source. Takes precedence over sourceCid.

sourceCid.@description: IPFS CID of the source, resolved at run time.

limit.@description: Max records to download. Caps the crawl and the price.

aggregator.@description: gateway (free, slow) or athena (AWS, paid, fast). Defaults to gateway.
